title: The Toys Hide Dressrosa’s Tragedy
description: Pages 1–4 focus on the toys hide dressrosa’s tragedy, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Don Chinjao, Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as dressrosa’s toys and forgotten people reveal that Doflamingo’s rule has erased lives, memories, and families from the country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All these big names!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: have been beaten down by these two men's collid-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He looked as though he was unable to fight, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Now!! Just what in the world are we seeing here!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hiyaho, seeing that you would conquer- or's haki...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Just what do you dream of becoming King of...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: King of the Pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What drivel!! Those POS- Sessing the "disposition of a King"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: know that they are common- place in the seas ahead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Everything will be deter- mined there....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Further ahead, at the summit, where those conquerors are the only thing holding each other back!!!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There is your "pirate King"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: From whom did you learn that Haki?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Rayleigh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...so he's still alive.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It pains me to hear that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I don't wish to recall the past!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Answer me, Strawhat, even though I would that I could forget!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A treasure that lays right before ones eyes eyes eyes eyes eyes eyes eyes eyes eyes eyes eyes....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But cannot be reached!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ohh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is there any other hell such as this!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What's this!!? That legendary pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is crying!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Uoohh Hh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HAA... HAA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Gramps...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I thought we had decided to carry big brother to victory...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: My training was also lacking... when he gets like this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nobody can stop Grandfa- their...!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: "Chinjao the Auger".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I was once called that, but no longer!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: Answer me!! What did GARP do to me!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I have no idea! Whether you're gonna cry or get mad, just go ahead and do it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Go, Lucy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: luffy- Dono...

summary: Pages 1–4 focus on the toys hide dressrosa’s tragedy, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
